text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that should do it. Floor and chairs, both
sparkly clean! Perfect! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Though that did take a while. Hard for the
cleaning staff to keep up with so many students
coming and going, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...If this is any indication, I get the feeling it won't
exactly be squeaky clean everywhere else either!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right, might as well tidy up where evil spirits
could enter! If I want everyone to be lucky, I've
got work to do!
